result.root_cause: MIDI tempo lived on track 0/meta at 100 BPM while note tracks lacked set_tempo; _render_track_procedural converted note ticks with the default 120 BPM tempo, so notes ended near 32.266s while the output buffer was sized to the 100 BPM midi.length of 38.719s plus tail.
